authoring_model.ownership: This section owns the target skill's SKILL.md facade contract and skill_mode classification.
authoring_model.guide_only_exception: guide_only is the single-file exception and keeps its full guidance inside SKILL.md.
authoring_model.facade_constraint: Only immediate hard constraints and first-hop structured routing may remain in SKILL.md.

required_read_sequence: references/routing/PROFILE_ROUTING.md when skill_mode selection is required
routing_protocol.machine_rule_source: Cli_Toolbox JSON outputs plus generated machine-readable contracts
routing_protocol.markdown_role: human audit, semantic routing, and anchor-based narrowing

mode_exemption.guide_only: guide_only skips downstream doc-structure tree enforcement and keeps all guidance inside SKILL.md.

guide_only.target_shape: single-file methodology skill with no extra docs or dedicated CLI

guide_with_tool.target_shape: facade-first methodology skill with doc tree and optional lint/audit/check tooling

executable_workflow_skill.target_shape: staged executable skill with facade, routing, governance atoms, runtime contract, and stage contract kit

tool_contracts.Cli_Toolbox.create_skill_from_template: Create or refactor a skill from the governed template pack.
tool_contracts.Cli_Toolbox.contract_reference: Return the authoring contract for governed skills.
tool_contracts.Cli_Toolbox.runtime_contract_template: Return the executable workflow runtime contract template asset.
tool_contracts.Cli_Toolbox.architecture_playbook: Return the architecture playbook for skill authoring.
tool_contracts.Cli_Toolbox.runtime_contract: Return this skill's own runtime contract.

asset_contracts.generated_output_expectation: generated skills must match the declared skill_mode exactly instead of being structurally rescued after generation

governance_rules: Every generated skill must declare top-level skill_mode in SKILL.md.
guide_only is the only single-file exception and must not silently grow a shadow doc tree.
guide_with_tool remains facade-first and doc-structure-governed, but does not require CLI-first dual-file runtime_contracts.
executable_workflow_skill must explicitly define resident docs, stage order, stage checklist, stage doc contract, stage command contract, stage graph contract, and stage-switch discard policy.
SKILL.md must remain an entry-only facade for all modes except guide_only.
The facade may keep only Immediate Contract and Structured Entry; detailed command inventories, structure indexes, and explanatory prose must stay below the facade.
The facade contract of the target skill is governed here by SkillsManager-Creation-Template.
SkillsManager-Doc-Structure is mandatory for guide_with_tool and executable_workflow_skill.
SkillsManager-Tooling-CheckUp shape governance must skip CLI/runtime-contract enforcement for guide_only and relax it for guide_with_tool.
Prefer whole-template rewrites over patch stacking when the architecture contract changes.
When template governance changes, update facade, runtime contracts, routing docs, references, assets, generator logic, tooling docs, and regression checks together.
validation_closure: generate at least one guide_only sandbox
generate at least one guide_with_tool sandbox
generate at least one executable_workflow_skill sandbox
run SkillsManager-Doc-Structure lint on generated guide_with_tool and executable_workflow_skill sandboxes
verify guide_only skips doc-structure and target-shape enforcement
verify executable workflow assets include stage checklist and contract quartet
